title: SetSpawn
description: A simple plugin for spawn in your world
body:
**[⚠️]NOTE!** If u have aby issue with the plugin please report to in our discord!

This plugin introduces two simple commands for managing and using the server spawn point:

1. /spawn (available to all players)

   Teleports the player to the server’s spawn location.
 
   When executed, the player receives two temporary effects: Blindness and Nausea.

   The teleportation has a 5-second delay before moving the player to spawn.

   After using /spawn, the player must wait 5 minutes (cooldown) before using the command again.

2. /setspawn (restricted to server admins)

   Sets the server’s spawn point at the admin’s current location.

   Once set, this location will be used for all future /spawn teleportations.

   This plugin is useful for survival or RPG-style servers where teleportation should feel more   .  immersive, with a short delay, disorienting effects, and a cooldown to prevent overuse.
